title: La ciudad no es para mí
writer: Pedro Masó, Vicente Coello, Fernando Lázaro Carreter
actors: Paco Martínez Soria, Doris Coll, Eduardo Fajardo
plot: Agustín Valverde is an old widower peasant who has always lived in the village of Calacervia, near Zaragoza. One day, he decides on a whim to go settle down in Madrid. When he arrives in the capital he is caught in the vortex of t...
